mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_file (repo_id, file_path, file_type, package_name, class_name, checksum, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{repoId} AS uuid), #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{packageName}, #{className}, #{checksum}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM code_file WHERE repo_id = CAST(#{repoId} AS uuid)
